# jpeg

```go
import "image/jpeg"
```

Package jpeg implements a JPEG image decoder and encoder.

JPEG is defined in ITU\-T T.81: https://www.w3.org/Graphics/JPEG/itu-t81.pdf.

## Constants

<a name="DefaultQuality"></a>DefaultQuality is the default quality encoding parameter.

```go
const DefaultQuality = 75
```

<a name="Decode"></a>

## func [Decode](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/jpeg/reader.go#L771>)

```go
func Decode(r io.Reader) (image.Image, error)
```

Decode reads a JPEG image from r and returns it as an [image.Image](<https://pkg.go.dev/image/#Image>).

<a name="DecodeConfig"></a>

## func [DecodeConfig](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/jpeg/reader.go#L778>)

```go
func DecodeConfig(r io.Reader) (image.Config, error)
```

DecodeConfig returns the color model and dimensions of a JPEG image without decoding the entire image.

<a name="Encode"></a>

## func [Encode](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/jpeg/writer.go#L575>)

```go
func Encode(w io.Writer, m image.Image, o *Options) error
```

Encode writes the Image m to w in JPEG 4:2:0 baseline format with the given options. Default parameters are used if a nil \*[Options](<#Options>) is passed.

<a name="FormatError"></a>

## type [FormatError](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/jpeg/reader.go#L18>)

A FormatError reports that the input is not a valid JPEG.

```go
type FormatError string
```

<a name="FormatError.Error"></a>

### func \(FormatError\) [Error](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/jpeg/reader.go#L20>)

```go
func (e FormatError) Error() string
```

<a name="Options"></a>

## type [Options](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/jpeg/writer.go#L569-L571>)

Options are the encoding parameters. Quality ranges from 1 to 100 inclusive, higher is better.

```go
type Options struct {
    Quality int
}
```

<a name="Reader"></a>

## type [Reader](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/jpeg/reader.go#L91-L94>)

Deprecated: Reader is not used by the [image/jpeg](<https://pkg.go.dev/image/jpeg/>) package and should not be used by others. It is kept for compatibility.

```go
type Reader interface {
    io.ByteReader
    io.Reader
}
```

<a name="UnsupportedError"></a>

## type [UnsupportedError](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/jpeg/reader.go#L23>)

An UnsupportedError reports that the input uses a valid but unimplemented JPEG feature.

```go
type UnsupportedError string
```
